mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_task (task_id, task_type, created_by, status, active_slot) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{taskType}, #{createdBy}, #{status}, #{activeSlot})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_task WHERE task_type = #{taskType} AND active_slot IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_task SET status = 'RETRY_WAIT', worker_id = NULL, lease_until = NULL, failure_code = #{failureCode}, failure_summary = #{failureSummary}, version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND version = #{expectedVersion} AND status = 'PROCESSING'

UPDATE ai_task SET status = 'SUCCESS', active_slot = NULL, worker_id = NULL, lease_until = NULL, failure_code = NULL, failure_summary = NULL, result_json = #{resultJson}, version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND version = #{expectedVersion} AND status = 'PROCESSING'

UPDATE ai_task SET status = 'FAILED', active_slot = NULL, worker_id = NULL, lease_until = NULL, failure_code = #{failureCode}, failure_summary = #{failureSummary}, version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND version = #{expectedVersion} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PROCESSING', 'RETRY_WAIT')

UPDATE ai_task SET status = 'PENDING', active_slot = #{activeSlot}, attempt_count = 0, worker_id = NULL, lease_until = NULL, failure_code = NULL, failure_summary = NULL, result_json = NULL, version = version + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 'FAILED' AND active_slot IS NULL
